name: Mauritson Wines
tagline: Six generations in Dry Creek Valley — small-production, single-vineyard wines.
seoDescription: Mauritson Wines — a six-generation Dry Creek Valley family winery in Healdsburg crafting single-vineyard Zinfandel and Bordeaux varietals.

hero.heading: Rooted in Dry Creek since 1868.
hero.subheading: A six-generation family winery crafting small-production, single-vineyard wines from Dry Creek Valley, Alexander Valley, and Rockpile.

about.heading: About Mauritson Wines
body: The Mauritson family has farmed the Dry Creek Valley since 1868 — six generations from sheep ranching to grape-growing. In the mid-1990s Clay Mauritson returned home determined to take the family’s fruit in a new direction, and released his first Zinfandel in 1998.
Today the estate produces small-lot, single-vineyard wines from three distinct appellations — Dry Creek Valley, Alexander Valley, and the rugged, high-elevation Rockpile.

services.title: Seated wine tastings

services.description: First access to limited Rockpile and Dry Creek releases for club members.

items.a: You'll find us at 2859 Dry Creek Road, Healdsburg, CA 95448.
We proudly serve Healdsburg, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at (707) 431-0804 — we're glad to help.

sections.heading: Get in touch with Mauritson Wines
sections.text: Call (707) 431-0804 or send a message — we'll get right back to you.
